response.original_title: Jacob Hawley: The King Of Holloway Road
response.overview: Jacob Hawley's first ever stand-up comedy special (he did 2 specials on Radio 4 a few years ago and now regrets that), filmed on 27th November 2025 on The Holloway Road in his local pub, Nambucca. The show was directed by Garrett Millerick.
response.title: Jacob Hawley: The King Of Holloway Road
